objectives.title: Patch server.js to scan adrs/ directory and dynamically render decision records in TOC
Implement syntax validation in server.js before saving system_prompts.json
Add UI error handling for malformed system prompt payloads
Design modal UI in index.html for displaying terminal stdout
Wire /api/:project/run-context endpoint to fetch live git status
Implement closed-loop validation: Block /state overwrites if git delta mapping or stdout exit codes indicate execution failure
